parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (user_id, state)
VALUES ({{ $json.callback_query.from.id }}, 'waiting_for_topic_name')
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET 
  state = 'waiting_for_topic_name',
  created_at = NOW();

WITH upsert_user AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.users (
    id,
    name,
    first_visit,
    last_visit,
    all_messages
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    '{{ ($json.user_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(),
    NOW(),
    0
  )
  ON CONFLICT (id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    last_visit = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),

insert_pending AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.pending_messages (
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    '{{ ($json.content || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(),
    '{{ ($json.message_type || "text").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.file_id ? "'" + $json.file_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_unique_id ? "'" + $json.file_unique_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_name ? "'" + $json.file_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.mime_type ? "'" + $json.mime_type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.caption ? "'" + $json.caption.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}
  )
  RETURNING
    id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption
)

SELECT *
FROM insert_pending;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.topic_id }},
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING
    id,
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

update_user_counter AS (
  UPDATE gnote.users u
  SET all_messages = COALESCE(u.all_messages, 0) + (SELECT saved_count FROM stats)
  WHERE u.id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING u.all_messages
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.topic_id }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT all_messages FROM update_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages
FROM stats;

WITH moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.id }},
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING
    id,
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

update_user_counter AS (
  UPDATE gnote.users u
  SET all_messages = COALESCE(u.all_messages, 0) + (SELECT saved_count FROM stats)
  WHERE u.id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING u.all_messages
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.id }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT all_messages FROM update_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages
FROM stats;

parameters.content:
Main Event Router

This block receives all incoming Telegram updates and routes them by event type.
- `message` — regular user text message
- `callback_query` — inline keyboard button click

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.title ASC;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.title ASC;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

messages_list AS (
  SELECT
    m.id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC) AS message_number,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN selected_topic st
    ON st.id = m.topic_id
   AND st.user_id = m.user_id
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC
),

result_messages AS (
  SELECT
    ml.*,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM messages_list ml
  CROSS JOIN selected_topic st
),

empty_result AS (
  SELECT
    NULL::BIGINT AS id,
    NULL::TEXT AS content,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP AS created_at,
    'empty'::TEXT AS message_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_unique_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_name,
    NULL::TEXT AS mime_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS caption,
    NULL::TEXT AS telegram_file_path,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_url,
    0::BIGINT AS message_number,
    0::BIGINT AS total_count,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM selected_topic st
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages_list)
)

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM result_messages

UNION ALL

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM empty_result;

SELECT
  m.id,
  m.user_id,
  m.topic_id,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,
  m.message_type,
  m.file_id,
  m.file_unique_id,
  m.file_name,
  m.mime_type,
  m.caption,
  t.title AS topic_title,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM gnote.messages m
JOIN gnote.topics t
  ON t.id = m.topic_id
 AND t.user_id = m.user_id
WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
  AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND m.file_id IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;
